ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  ASTEC LifeSciences Limited shareholders approved all seven resolutions via postal ballot, including several board appointments and the ratification of related party transactions (RPTs) with its holding companies for FY2026-27 beyond materiality thresholds. While director appointments passed overwhelmingly, the RPT approvals received a narrow majority (52.86%) among valid non-promoter votes, indicating significant dissent or concern from independent shareholders regarding these material transactions.
